    Class NodeBuilder

    Defines a node object within an armature.

    Name Description
    AnimationTracksNames
    HasAnimations

    Gets a value indicating whether this NodeBuilder has animations.
    LocalMatrix

    Gets or sets the local transform Matrix4x4 of this NodeBuilder.
    LocalTransform

    Gets or sets the local Scale, Rotation and Translation of this NodeBuilder.

    Root
    Rotation

    Gets the current rotation transform, or null.
    Scale

    Gets the current Scale transform, or null.
    Translation

    Gets the current translation transform, or null.

    Gets or sets the world transform Matrix4x4 of this NodeBuilder.

    Checks if the collection of joints can be used for skinning a mesh.
    SetLocalTransform(AffineTransform, bool)

    Sets the local transform of this node. Optionally it is possible keep children from being affected by this node transformation change.
